hotels.name: Holiday Inn Resort Mazatlan by IHG
hotels.description_fr:
Holiday Inn Resort Mazatlan offers an outdoor pool, fitness centre and business centre. Guests can enjoy the on-site restaurant and bar.

Every room at this hotel is air conditioned and comes with a flat-screen cable TV, private bathroom with a hair dryer and amenities. An iron with ironing board as well as a safety deposit box is available. A coffee maker can also be found in the room.

The Sky Gym is located on the 13th floor overlooking the Pacific Ocean. There is meeting room available overlooking the ocean as well.

General Rafael Buelna International Airport is 21 km away.
